original_question: A researcher is building a cross-domain benchmark. Between 2009 and 2013 (inclusive), identify the year with the highest solar renewable generation capacity. Within that same year, find the largest quarterly “In-Basin Solar Installed (kW)”; call it Q. In that year, find the largest single fuel-type electricity-generation value (in GWh); call it G. In that year, among the four electricity-sales sectors (Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Transportation), find the sector whose sales (in GWh) are closest to G and record that sector’s sales value; call it S. In the agricultural transfer-tax series, count how many fiscal years have tax collected strictly greater than S + 10×Q + G; call this count C. Define yearZ = 1980 + C. In yearZ, how many electricity-sales sectors (TBtu) have sales strictly greater than S/1000? Answer as: [integer].
question: Starting with the period 2009-2013, identify the year with the highest solar generation capacity. For that year, find the highest quarterly solar installation (kW) and the largest single-source electricity generation value (GWh). Identify the electricity sector sales figure (GWh) closest to that electricity generation value. Calculate the following threshold: the sector sales plus the generation value plus 10 times the solar installation value. Count how many fiscal years had agricultural transfer taxes exceeding this threshold. Add that count to 1980 to determine a target year. Finally, in that target year, how many electricity sectors had sales (in TBtu) exceeding 1/1000th of the sector sales figure identified earlier?

1.fact: Between 2009 and 2013 (inclusive), the year with the highest Solar (MW) renewable generation capacity is 2013 (183.3), with no tie for highest in that range.
1.subquestion: Between 2009 and 2013 (inclusive), which year has the highest Solar (MW) renewable generation capacity?

2.fact: Within calendar year 2013, the maximum quarterly “In-Basin Solar Installed (kW)” is 11041 (at Q4-2013), with no tie for maximum within that year.
2.subquestion: Within calendar year <node_1 answer>, what is the maximum quarterly value of “In-Basin Solar Installed (kW)”?

3.fact: In 2013, the largest single fuel-type electricity-generation value is 57039.0 GWh (Natural Gas), with no tie for largest.
3.subquestion: In year <node_1 answer>, what is the largest single fuel-type electricity-generation value (in GWh)?

4.fact: In 2013, Residential electricity sales are 50777 GWh, which is the unique closest sector sales value to 57039 GWh (absolute difference 6262).
4.subquestion: In year <node_1 answer>, among the four electricity-sales sectors (Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Transportation), what is the sector sales value (in GWh) that is closest to <node_3 answer> (use absolute difference)?

5.fact: Let threshold = 50777 + 10*11041 + 57039 = 218226. There are 32 fiscal years with tax collected strictly greater than 218226.
5.subquestion: Define threshold = (<node_4 answer>) + 10*(<node_2 answer>) + (<node_3 answer>). In the agricultural transfer-tax series, how many fiscal years have tax collected strictly greater than threshold?

6.fact: Let yearZ = 1980 + 32 = 2012 and threshold = 50777/1000 = 50.777. In 2012, exactly 2 sectors have electricity sales (TBtu) strictly greater than 50.777.
6.subquestion: Let C = <node_5 answer> and define yearZ = 1980 + C. In yearZ, how many sectors (Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Transportation) have electricity sales (in TBtu) strictly greater than (<node_4 answer> / 1000)?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: the solar-capacity peak year (2009–2013) is 2013.
Node 2 depends on node 1: within 2013, the maximum quarterly installed value is Q = 11041.
Node 3 depends on node 1: in 2013, the largest fuel-type generation value is G = 57039.
Node 4 depends on nodes 1 and 3: in 2013, the sector sales value closest to G is S = 50777.
Node 5 depends on nodes 2–4: threshold = S + 10*Q + G = 218226; the count of fiscal years with tax collected above threshold is C = 32.
Node 6 depends on nodes 4–5: yearZ = 1980 + 32 = 2012; threshold = S/1000 = 50.777; the number of TBtu sectors above threshold in 2012 is 2.
